MISSIONS_T2_TUTORIAL_TEST_P_COMPLETIONTE:
"Ne savaştı ama! İyi dövüştün, [playername]!
Seni Albion'a götürme vakti!"
MISSIONS_T2_TUTORIAL_TEST_P_OFFERTEXT:
"Plan şu: Sen ortalığı biraz karıştır, ben de üslerinin yanından geçeceğim süreceğim.

İşin bittiğinde işaret ateşini yak ve [b]bizimle hisardaki limanda buluş.[/b]"
MISSIONS_T2_TUTORIAL_TEST_P_PROGRESSTEXT: "Mühimmat depolarını ateşe ver ve [b]bizimle hisardaki limanda buluş.[/b]"
MISSIONS_T2_TUTORIAL_TEST_P_SIDETEXT: İnkârcı öldürerek bir dikkat dağınıklığı yarat.
MISSIONS_T2_TUTORIAL_TEST_P5_SIDETEXT: Adadan ayrılmak için Tia ile buluş.
MISSIONS_T2_TUTORIAL_TEST_P6_SIDETEXT: Mühimmat depolarını ateşe vererek daha fazla kargaşa yarat.
MISSIONS_T2_TUTORIAL_TEST_P7_SIDETEXT: Bir işaret ateşi yakarak gemiyi çağır.
MISSIONS_T2_TUTORIALCOMBAT4_ANY_HERETIC_: Herhangi bir İnkârcı baş düşmanı öldür.
10 İnkârcı ya da 1 İnkârcı baş düşman öldür.
MISSIONS_T3_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_HERETIC_GEN: Those damned Heretic mages keep setting fire to our wagons. Go teach them a lesson - and try not to take a dagger in the back while you're at it!
Last patrol came back without any eyebrows - close call there!
Every time we step outside the walls, we get peppered with arrows - and even if we hit one of the bastards, they're back on their feet in a trice. Go and cause some more permanent damage, would you?
I hope you remembered your shield?
OK, the captain's getting fed up with Heretics harassing our convoys, and he wants to see results. Get out there and kill anything that moves.
I can still see- oh wait, that was a rabbit.
MISSIONS_T3_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_PROMOTION_1: You've demonstrated at least some minimal competence. Take this to [variable:AGENT_A] and you might get some more interesting work.
You have the letter of recommendation?
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_HUNTER_1_:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Patrols need better bows, also other hand implements for when they're feeling brave.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_HUNTER_2_:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Old leathers smell too much to be used.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_HUNTER_3_:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

More equipment for patrols, their routes are becoming more and more dangerous
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_1_OF:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Need range of staffs for training mages in different kinds of magic.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_1_PR: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_2_OF:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Bloody moths!
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_2_PR: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_3_OF:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Equipment for patrolling mages. They patrol in the dark mainly.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_3_PR: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_1_O:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Patrols need capes to stay dry, and bags to collect firewood.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_1_P: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_2_O:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Need tools to collect resources to build watchtowers in remote new settlements.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_2_P: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_3_O:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Old tools are all blunt. Couldn't skin a stick of butter with this knife!
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_3_P: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_WARRIOR_1:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Provide selection of weapons for recruits. Back in my day we got a sword and we liked it. Kids these days don't know how good they have it.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_WARRIOR_2:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Replacement armor needed for patrols, damp causing rust in existing equipment, and general misery.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_WARRIOR_3:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Increasing patrol sizes to newer areas on the continent so need more equipment!
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T3_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_BUILDING: If we want to equip our patrols properly, we're going to need to upgrade our military buildings to make better gear. Get out there and gather wood and stone to improve facilities.
You'll need more common resources as well if you want to upgrade something, mind.
MISSIONS_T3_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_HUNTER_1: You know why Hunters are great on patrol? Because they know what being on the other side of the fence is like. Gather some resources to make bows and leather armour, so we can put their skills to good use.
You're going to need to kill some wolves, by the way. Hope you're prepared for that!
MISSIONS_T3_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_MAGE_1_O: We need you to conjure some resources for our mages... Ha! Do you see what I did there? Because they use magic? Well, I thought it was funny.
MISSIONS_T3_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_MAGE_1_P: Of course you can't actually 'conjure' resources - you have to go out and gather them yourself. By hand. Sorry. But you know about the circle of production, right? You've got this.
MISSIONS_T3_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_PROMOTIO: You've demonstrated at least some minimal competence. Take this to [variable:AGENT_A] and you might get some more interesting work.
You have the letter of recommendation?
MISSIONS_T3_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_TOOLS_1_: If we're going to sustain this pace of production, we're going to need more tools - and for that, we need more wood and more ore! Go out and harvest some, so we can keep on schedule.
Life would be much easier if tools didn't wear out over time...
MISSIONS_T3_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_WARRIOR_: Warriors are brave, bold, valiant... er... other words like that. They're also pretty damn reckless. Get us some ore and hide and fiber so we can whip them up some armor that can protect them from themselves...
The amount of them I've seen running headlong into trees... Killed one of them once!
MISSIONS_T3_TRANSPORT_ROYALSTEWARD_HEAVY: There's a shipment of oil here for our boys and girls patrolling the outlands. The poor buggers work day and night, rain or shine. Give them something to burn on a campfire or lanterns, for some small comfort.
Creature comforts are few and far between on the remote patrols!

We're running a bit low on liquid refreshment for the troops, and it's vital for morale that we keep supplies topped up. Luckily I've managed to source some totally legit substitute - just read the label, it's "natural" and "enriched", so it's gotta be good, right?
No, I don't know what it's actually enriched *with*...

Our rations chef has devised a special dish for the patrols; chilled pig fat chowder with freshly grated tree bark. Its making was the most abominable horror I have ever witnessed, but it has all the nutrients a marching guard needs. Deliver these barrels of it to our logistics people, and... don't breathe near it.
Have you delivered the chowder yet? The troops will be so grateful...
MISSIONS_T3_TRANSPORT_ROYALSTEWARD_LIGHT: You've probably noticed already that it can get a little chilly at night? Some of our night sentries are getting so cold they're falling asleep at their posts, and we can't have that. I need you to deliver these animal furs to keep them awake and alert.
Yes, we noticed the smell too, but we figured it'd help keep them awake.

Psst! Listen, I have a package I have to get to a friend of mine, but I need it done in complete secret. I'd do it myself but too many people know my face 'round here. Get it done quickly and cleanly and I'll trust you enough to give you more... interesting work in the future.

Has the bird landed yet? The bird, landed... you - the package is the bird, and you dropping it off is the landing. The bird... just - never mind! I mean have you delivered the package yet? Actually, I don't want to know. It might implicate me. Go away!
We need these maps of patrol routes distributed to the guards, with the utmost care I must add. These mustn't fall into the hands of highwaymen or raiders, or, gods forbid, the Heretic pests!
No, you're supposed to deliver the patrol routes, not follow them yourself!
MISSIONS_T3_TRANSPORT_ROYALSTEWARD_PROMO: You've demonstrated at least some minimal competence. Take this to [variable:AGENT_A] and you might get some more interesting work.
You have the letter of recommendation?
MISSIONS_T4_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_KEEPER_BOSS: The lady with the axe, we want her gone. She's putting the fear of hell into my troops - well, that and the fear of losing an arm! The male troops are even worried about going for a piss... She's got to be stopped!
I come out in a cold sweat just thinking about it sometimes!

The chief savages can break a skull with a single swing of their hammers. Lives snuffed out in a single moment. They're thinning our ranks far too quickly; we need the threat dealt with now, not later.
It's a bloody horror for troop morale to see them all go so quickly...
MISSIONS_T4_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_KEEPER_GENE: We're finding outposts torn down in the area, and there always seem to be axe marks all over the ruins. Find out who's responsible and demonstrate our displeasure.
And by 'demonstrate our displeasure' I mean 'kill them all', of course.
Private Cotton claims his entire patrol was butchered by cross-eyed madmen. Captain wants someone to go and look into it, and it looks like you drew the short straw this time.
Between you and me, I suspect Private Cotton may be making it all up.
Our people keep getting killed by maniacs, but they're suspiciously well-organized. There's got to be someone else directing them. Find out who, and ask them nicely to stop.
I hope you understood the subtext there. Here, let me spell it out: IF THEY DON'T STOP, KILL THEM ALL. Clear? Good.
MISSIONS_T4_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_PROMOTION_1: You've demonstrated at least some minimal competence. Take this to [variable:AGENT_A] and you might get some more interesting work.
You have the letter of recommendation?
MISSIONS_T4_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_UNDEAD_BOSS: There's a right sharpshooter in the midst of the undead - well, I suppose they have had two lifetimes to practice... We need them got rid of, we can't make any kind of push on the crypts until they're gone!
Hopefully we'll be able to make it through now that we're not losing an eye or two every time we try...

The Deathlords of the Undead have some ancient ability, honed over centuries, trained in this world and the next... The ability to scare the pants off my troops! Get them out of the way, the new recruits can't fight when their thighs are chafing with their own piss!
It's not like we need any more obstructions to good hygiene up here...

The Lieutenants of the Undead just march around aimlessly, like they're looking for their lost troops. I almost feel sorry for them. But then I think about how many of us they've killed. Put them out of their misery, will you?
The burden of a lieutenant... To have all of those lives on your shoulders. It's a dark place to stick a soul for eternity.
MISSIONS_T4_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_UNDEAD_GENE: We've had worrying reports of the dead rising from their graves and living again. Also, battling again. Head over to some graveyards and see... well, see if they can die again?
Just keep hitting them, I'm told that's the trick.

The bad news is that the dead are rising from their graves, and the worse news is they seem to be somewhat militant. Your orders are to head out and destruction-test their tactics, see if they've got any surprises up their sleeves.
I'll be honest, I'm not expecting you to find that they're military geniuses. But we need to be sure!
The Captain has a theory that, if the Undead are animated by magic, killing their mages might cause them all to collapse. Go and test that, would you?
I can't say I'm optimistic about this one, but Captain's orders...
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_HUNTER_1_:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Replacing losses from wear and tear due to endless training exercises.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_HUNTER_2_:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Troops wish to experiment with alternative weaponry.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_HUNTER_3_:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Farms have rats. Rats eat leather. You do the math.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_1_OF:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Need replacement staffs, old ones are worn out. Keep misfiring. Nasty business.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_1_PR: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_2_OF:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Wish to acquire some advanced staffs for skilled mages.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_2_PR: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_3_OF:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Require more comfortable armor. Also more reading material.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_3_PR: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_1_O:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Dear sir/madam, I hope this finds you well. My master has asked me to acquire more bags and capes, and this necessitates the completion of this requisition form detailing the reasoning for my needing more bags and capes. Yours Sincerely, George.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_1_P: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_2_O:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Need tools for building walls and fences. No, not just around my gardens. I'm going to use them to help others, too!
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_2_P: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_3_O:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Need general implements to facilitate destruction of wildlife for the good of humans.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_3_P: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_WARRIOR_1:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

If you're going to make my girls and boys stand around all day guarding a damn farm, the least you can do is give them decent equipment.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_WARRIOR_2:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Why do you *think* I want more weapons? To make handkerchiefs?'
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_WARRIOR_3:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

I need some armor. For my troops. I hate paperwork.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T4_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_BUILDING: Food is our priority right now: we need fields, mills, butchers and so on. Lots of infrastructure needs building, and we need YOU to gather wood and stone to help with that. So go on, get out there and chop slash mine delete as appropriate.
Everybody's gotta eat, right? In fact I- I'm hungry right now!
MISSIONS_T4_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_HUNTER_1: Hunters tend to be particularly sharp-eyed, which makes them great at watching out for trouble. Gather resources for some Hunter equipment so we can mount a proper watch on our storehouses.
Yep, they're sharp-eyed all right. And interestingly, they don't eat much. Perfect for the job!
MISSIONS_T4_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_MAGE_1_O: A bit of magic would beef up our agricultural defenses - nothing says "don't steal that" like a good old-fashioned fireball to the face. But... we'll need resources to produce their equipment, of course. That's your job today.
MISSIONS_T4_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_MAGE_1_P: Actually, now that I think about it, it's possible that throwing fireballs around on a farm isn't the greatest idea...
MISSIONS_T4_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_PROMOTIO: You've demonstrated at least some minimal competence. Take this to [variable:AGENT_A] and you might get some more interesting work.
You have the letter of recommendation?
MISSIONS_T4_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_TOOLS_1_: To run proper farms, we're going to need a good selection of tools. Which will require resources, which will be gathered by you. Right? Right.
If we treat our farmyard beasts like royalty, they'll bring us sovereign produce. No, I'm not making a joke about the King.
MISSIONS_T4_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_WARRIOR_: Some stout warriors to protect our food stores would be a good idea, no? And for that, we need ore and hide. Off you toddle, collect some up. Thank You kindly!
Wouldn't want anyone applying a five-finger discount to our wares, after all. Or a five-sack discount, for that matter.
MISSIONS_T4_TRANSPORT_ROYALSTEWARD_HEAVY: The farmers need tools to keep the animals healthy; rasps for trimming hooves, hammers and chisels for shoeing... all of which can coincidentally also be used for preparing cheese! Ah, those farmers are resourceful.
There's a bit of a taste but you get used to it.
I need you to take this giant pile of ripe manure to a farm somewhere. Now, please.
I don't care which farm, so long as it's a long way away.

There's reports that crows have been decimating the farms they're trying to get going up north. These are some shirts and doublets from last year; apparently they're no longer in vogue back home, so they can be used for dressing scarecrows. Deliver them to my colleague for distribution.
You know there's actually someone who styles and dresses these scarecrows? That's a job someone is paid real money to do.
MISSIONS_T4_TRANSPORT_ROYALSTEWARD_LIGHT: We've had reports of rat infestations at some of the smaller farms in the west, so I need you to take these semi-feral kittens we...er, acquired, and deliver them to the farmers. So yes, you're carrying a bag of kittens. Enjoy.
These kittens are vicious, you understand, not meant for pets - and I'll know if you take one.

Right, be careful with these; they're very delicate... and, well, there's a distinct buzzing noise coming from inside, we reckon there's a few live ones in there. When you've delivered them, you can rest proud in the knowledge that you ensured the king and his courtiers can have a bit of honey in their tea of a morning. Ah... It's a valiant war we're fighting.
The farms in the east get freezing at night; the poor cows who happened to get shipped over there are suffering! Get this hay over to them so we can keep them nice and warm and... alive.
Apparently their milk's freezing in their udders! Nasty way to go...
MISSIONS_T4_TRANSPORT_ROYALSTEWARD_PROMO: You've demonstrated at least some minimal competence. Take this to [variable:AGENT_A] and you might get some more interesting work.
You have the letter of recommendation?
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_KEEPER_PROMOTION_1_OF: You have served Albion well, friend. Take this token to [variable:AGENT_A], that you may serve further.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_KEEPER_PROMOTION_1_PR: Service does the land honour, friend.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_KEEPER_UNDEAD_BOSS_1_: A talented archer of old is now training his bow on our peaceful hunting parties. This threat must be removed; we cannot lose another soul to it.
Is the deed done, friend? Can we enter the night unshielded once more?
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_KEEPER_UNDEAD_BOSS_2_: The Deathlords bring death to this land. Their mists shrivel mighty trees and turn beautiful flowers wizened and gray. Nothing can live while they poison the earth. Relinquish their hold on this sacred life!
Wrest Albion from their grasp, before it's too late!
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_KEEPER_UNDEAD_BOSS_3_: The Lieutenants yearn to lead, to protect, to be followed; they do not understand that their troops are gone, either travelled to the world beyond, or awakened, and hopelessly pursuing the traces of their old selves. Assuage their yearning for battle.
To ride into war once more... That is their only wish. A great and noble death.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_KEEPER_UNDEAD_GENERIC: These Undead soldiers persist in digging holes in the ground. Do they perhaps seek more of their comrades? No matter, they disturb things that should not be disturbed. Stop them.
How goes the fight? Is the silent earth free from Undead machinations?
I have directed my people to keep their distance from the Undead, but their archers and mages continue to harass us. Please, for their own good, dissuade them.
What need has a walking skeleton of magic, anyway?
Much as we would like to leave them in peace, the Undead in this area risk disturbing something... something that they should not. Drive them away before something unpleasant happens.
There are darker things here than the risen dead.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_MORGANA_PROMOTION_1_O: You have helped us dull the ache of the Undead horde. Take this note of recommendation to [variable:AGENT_A], and my thanks.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_MORGANA_PROMOTION_1_P: Continue to serve Morgana, outsider, and you could soon find yourself brought among her Knights.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_MORGANA_UNDEAD_BOSS_1: Their arrows cannot pierce our armor, but they know where to shoot for uncovered flesh; the neck, the groin, the grooves of our helms. Our knights bleed to death before they know they've been hit. Make sure you give them the same slow fate.
I want them to feel their stolen half-lives drain from them slowly.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_MORGANA_UNDEAD_BOSS_2: Do you feel your legs grow heavy as you enter that mist? That's the Deathlords. Their magic can put you into a deathly sleep if you are exposed to it for too long. So be quick killing them, won't you dear?
Don't worry, if you do get sent under, we'll always be right behind you ready to awaken you...
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_MORGANA_UNDEAD_BOSS_3: These Lieutenants believe they still rule armies, unaware that their orders are barked to no one but themselves. Ha! Show them their place, will you sweet?
Their words hold no power now. Show them.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_MORGANA_UNDEAD_GENERI: The magic-wielding dead are tiresome - not strong enough to expend energy on; not weak enough to ignore. Deal with them, and prove that you have some character.
Don't return to me until you've finished the work.
How can skeletons loose arrows this fast? Break their bows, and break their bones.
Those husks clad in iron. The Undead call them soldiers, but they are not what they once were. They are merely relics of forgotten wars. Remind them of that.
These husks are hollow, their victories forgotten. They are to be shown no mercy.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_HERETIC_GEN: Heretic thieves are rushing in to stab us in the backs, while their archers pick us off from afar. We need to break through them if we want to move ahead. And we do want that.
Have you made it through this damn wall of Heretics yet? You've been given a lot of responsibility now; we're trusting you with this.
We want to make sure that, when the Heretic leaders go down, they stay down. Make sure their healers don't interfere with our plans.
We're not sure if they can actually resurrect people, but we don't want to find out the hard way.
We suspect that the higher-ranking Heretic mages are acting as advisers to their leadership. Taking some of them out of the picture might make bringing the whole organization down much easier.
They surely cannot survive much more of this.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_KEEPER_BOSS: The lower ranks have reported a huge woman walking around throwing axes at anything that moves. We'd hoped that they were just making her up, but my Lieutenant saw her this morning. Fancy like dealing with her for us, too? Confirmed: she is darned frightening!
Poor lad will need a pair of new breeches after that little encounter.
One of those Chieftain blokes went on a rampage after we slaughtered his tribe. Yes, it's understandable, but yes, we want him eliminated. Just... Put him out of his misery will you?
It's not like we can even spare their women... They'd put an axe in your head just as quick!
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_KEEPER_GENE: This is the very edge of our influence in Albion, and I'm fed up with pulling axes out of the outer walls every morning. It's time to stop being defensive, and strike out into the continent!
It'd be better for them if they'd just leave us alone.
We believe the druids are directing Keeper attacks. You'll need to deal with their berserkers to get to them, though.
If they're so smart, why do they keep getting in our way?
We've tried everything else - how about you just go and kill as many Keepers as you can find, and see if that convinces them to back off.
I find this sort of order distasteful, personally, but they're forcing our hand.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_UNDEAD_BOSS: Captain wants this archer dealt with; apparently they've had one causing problems in the lower ranks... Seems they're now coordinating their attacks to distract us for some kind of plan. Make sure we don't find out what that plan is, right?
We don't want to wait long enough to find out what they've got planned for us... Best kill the damn archer first.

The Undead Deathlords are apparently causing some er... mess in the lower ranks. Well, they've now turned to us, too, and though we're no cowards, I'm struggling to keep my troops in line when they enter that mist. Go and get rid of them for us, too.
We can't afford to mess these beautiful trousers - they cost far too much!
The Undead Lieutenants are angry, lost. I'm thinking they need a bit of guidance to work out where they're going. Lead them back to their graves, will you?
Have you taken them to their final destination? Make sure they stay down there, this time.
MISSIONS_T5_COMBAT_ROYALARMY_UNDEAD_GENE: This Undead menace needs to be halted in its tracks. Destroy their front-line fighters so we can do some real damage.
The uprising of Undead is getting out of hand. You'll need to deal with their archers if you're going to have any luck pushing them back.
I wonder where they're getting all their arrows?
The Undead could be a serious threat to our presence here, and their mages are the biggest headache. Please, go and thin their numbers a little!
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_HUNTER_1_:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Please send more bows. Lots more bows.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_HUNTER_2_:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Seeing more close-quarter action than anticipated. Many dead. Improvements needed.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_HUNTER_3_:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Wear and tear/damage from enemy troops/lost due to dead soldiers.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_1_OF:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Not enough damage output yet.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_1_PR: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_2_OF:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Support staffs are useful for keeping our support staff alive.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_2_PR: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_3_OF:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

If we're going to go to battle wearing cloth armor, I would like it to be *good* cloth armor at least.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_MAGE_3_PR: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_1_O:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Replacing dead couriers.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_1_P: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_2_O:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Need better capabilities for sourcing repair materials on-site.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_2_P: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_3_O:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Requisitioning tools which can double as weapons as needed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_TOOLS_3_P: Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_WARRIOR_1:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Replacements for weapons broken due to excessive, enthusiastic killing of enemies.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_WARRIOR_2:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

Replacement for weapons lost through general troop attrition.
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_CRAFT_ROYALARTISAN_WARRIOR_3:
The King has authorized a subsidy in Silver for any individual who crafts the items listed in the attached work order, for the reason:

New armor to replace old armor now full of holes in all the wrong places'
Please report to your assigned Artisanal contact when the work is completed.
MISSIONS_T5_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_BUILDING: Got an order in for a big stack of high-quality wood and stone, for building defenses and the like. From what I hear from the front, they're going to need plenty of it soon enough. Can you get out there and collect some for me?
The resources you're pulling in today might be saving someone's life tomorrow.
MISSIONS_T5_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_HUNTER_1: Seems that the Sixth got hit by an awful rainstorm holding their hill the other night, and that much mud and rain plays hell with bows and leathers. Need to get new gear made up, so you gotta pull me in some hide and wood quick-like, alright?
Don't normally want to be fielding archers in those sorts of conditions, but war ain't always normal.
MISSIONS_T5_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_MAGE_1_O: Rumour is the last attack didn't have enough magical support, and it cost our troops pretty heavily. I'm anticipating a rush order for Mages' gear soon, and I'd like to get ahead of the curve on this one. Can you pull in the resources I need?
MISSIONS_T5_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_MAGE_1_P: If they'd had a few more healers out there, they might've lost a lot fewer troops...
MISSIONS_T5_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_TOOLS_1_: You're a veteran at this by now, right? So I say "more tools needed", and you're already up and off collecting the wood and ore we need. Right? The circle... yes...
You know the drill - I don't need to give you any more instructions.
MISSIONS_T5_GATHER_ROYALFORAGER_WARRIOR_: Just got word, the last big attack was a failure. Lotta dead people, and a lotta busted-up armour and weapons. They need ore, hide and fiber for replacement equipment ASAP, or they're going to be fighting off the counter-attack with sticks and stones.
Luckily the field smiths are pretty good at patching up plate by now. King knows they've had plenty of practice...
MISSIONS_T5_TRANSPORT_ROYALSTEWARD_HEAVY: Big shipment of medical supplies for the front. We need to make sure our medics are seriously stocked up before we start the next push, because they're going to need it.
Let's just hope our casualties come back in few enough pieces that they need healers rather than gravediggers.

You be careful with these - very careful. The compounds in these barrels are very unstable. If there's a spark anywhere near you as you're carrying them, you and your fine mount will spontaneously combust. Yes, that means fire. No, it's not good.
Please keep a safe distance from... well, anyone and everyone.

This is a load of old scrap metal we've found digging around the ruins in the centre of the continent. Should be bashed into makeshift shields and helms for the poorer troops if they can't craft one themselves.
We're hoping we haven't picked up any of that antique gold our historians were looking at...
MISSIONS_T5_TRANSPORT_ROYALSTEWARD_LIGHT: You're a trusted ally at this point, so I'll be straight with you: here is a package of assassination orders, please take them to my colleague so he can distribute them to our agents. If we can eliminate certain enemy leaders, it'll save a lot of lives.
Yes, there are a lot of them. I know.
Casualty reports from our front-line patrols, for delivery. It's important for the King and his advisors to have a good idea of what's happening, and keeping track of troop losses is part of that.
Yes, there are a lot of them. I know.

Identification rings for regimental leaders. Sometimes when the big white guys with the maces get hold of one... there's no other way of us knowing who they were so we can tell their family. Make sure these get delivered and worn, yes?
Being able to tell their families is the least we owe them.
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_HERETIC_BOSS_1: A dark thing lurks in the shadows; silent footsteps, a heavy cloak, eyes alight with madness and the glimmer of gold. Destroy it, that we might make more offerings to Mother.
Mother gives so much, and asks so little. We must give her the offerings.
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_HERETIC_BOSS_2: The Arsonists work indiscriminately, setting light to the dry grasses and burning entire forests to the ground. We cannot bear it, it burns us too! Please help us protect the wild from their flames!
Break their bodies as they break our hearts!
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_HERETIC_GENERI: Heretic mages disrupt the flows of the land. Dispose of them and their kin.
My brethren suffer from stab-wounds and stolen fetishes. Find those responsible and break them.
We tire of the Heretics' poor arrows. They do dishonour to the wood that made them! Break their quivers, and their necks too.
What shame, to be killed by such poor craftsmanship!
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_MORGANA_BOSS_1: The priestesses of Morgana are channels for her power, tainting the earth with her touch once more. They tether her to this world - the tie must be broken!
She is diminished, but never dead. We must remove anything that could light her path back to this world!
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_MORGANA_GENERI: The Disciples of Morgana return to Albion. Their helms burn bright with cunning. End them, now.
There can be no mercy here, friend.
They take life from the land, but nothing more. They dishonour the spirits of those they kill. Repay the debt.
To kill the creatures of the land is permitted, provided you bring them new purpose.
The cultists spread Her lies. Reach them and silence them; She is capable of corrupting even the strongest minds.
The weak must not hear Her words!
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_PROMOTION_1_OF: You have served Albion well, friend. Take this token to [variable:AGENT_A], that you may serve further.
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_PROMOTION_1_PR: Service does the land honour, friend.
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_UNDEAD_BOSS_1_: An Infiltrator entered our yearly ritual of the equinox, and picked off the weak as they danced and made music... The children, the old, the sick praying to be healed... This is an abomination. Kill any you see. And make them suffer.
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_UNDEAD_BOSS_2_: The archmages, reawakened, still seek to push the boundaries of magic. We grow wary of their foul experiments. Ensure they are... made safe.
They play with powers beyond their control. They cannot be allowed to continue.
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_UNDEAD_BOSS_3_: These are the Voyagers, the bold adventures sent out against the forces of Morgana at the height of the war. None of them ever returned. Their will to follow their masters, for victory in battle, still remains. They were so young... Put their hearts to rest.
They have done more than their duty.
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_KEEPER_UNDEAD_GENERIC: Why do they walk the land once more? We can hope that destroying their physical form will allow them to rest again.
It is a sad duty, but a necessary one.
They loose their arrows with the same courage, the same strength... but now no purpose. Give them peace.
They do not understand this new world.
What secrets might their mages carry with them? But we owe them their peace, they have suffered enough.
One death is more than enough for any soul.
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_MORGANA_HERETIC_BOSS_: This sneak thief sends in his underlings to goad our steel away, then takes what he wishes from our abandoned camps. The Heretics are far too puny to bear our weapons; what do they want with them?
We fear they may be melting down our weapons to arm their legions...

§ 14 Hileden Koruma
Yayımcı; Kamu Oyun Güvenliği hizmetini ("Easy Anti-Cheat") ve Wellbia Co. Ltd. hizmetini ("Xigncode") kullanır. Bunlar, Yayımcı'ya hizmet sunan üçüncü taraf hizmet sağlayıcıları tarafından işletilir. 
Easy Anti-Cheat ve Xigncode, Yazılım Ürünü'ne entegre bir istemci yazılımına ("İstemci") sahiptir. Yeni bir Oyun oturumu başlattığınızda İstemci, Birim'e en güncel sürümünü otomatik olarak yükler. Yazılım Ürünü'nü Biriminizde kullanırken Easy Anti-Cheat ve Xigncode, Oyun içerisinde hileyi tespit edip önlemek amacıyla ("Amaç") Oyun bileşenlerini analiz edip Birim'in hafızasını tarayarak Birim'i gözlemler. Bu Amaç için Easy Anti-Cheat ve Xigncode, Oyun içerisinde kullanılan hile yöntemlerine dair bilgileri ("Veri") saklar. Veri, Easy Anti-Cheat'in gizlilik beyanı ve Xigncode'un son kullanıcı lisans anlaşmasında belirtildiği şekilde kişisel verilerinizi içerir. Bu Yazılım Ürünü'nü yükleyerek, kopyalayarak veya başka bir şekilde kullanarak Easy Anti-Cheat ve Xigncode'un yalnızca bu Amaç için Veri toplamasına, saklamasına, paylaşmasına ve yayımlamasına rızanız olduğunu belirtmiş olursunuz. Easy Anti-Cheat ve Xigncode'un işleme faaliyetlerinin, otomatik karar alma yöntemleri içerdiğini onaylayıp kabul edersiniz. Bu yöntemlerin, oyunda hile kullandığınız tespit edilirse oyundan uzaklaştırılabilecek olmanız gibi sizin için önemli etkileri olabilir. Veri yalnızca Amaç için kullanılır. Bilgisayar oyunlarında hile yapmak için kullanılan oyuncu hesaplarının tanımlanıp uzaklaştırılması, hile davranışı ve kodlarının analiz edilmesi, hileler hakkında verilerin ayrı olarak Easy Anti-Cheat ve Xigncode'un bağlı kurumlarıyla paylaşılması gibi eylemler Amaca dâhildir ancak burada belirtilenler Amacı kapsamlı olarak tanımlamaz. Oyun'u kullanma hakkına (ör. Yazılım Ürünü) yalnızca Easy Anti-Cheat ve Xigncode'un bu hüküm ve koşulları ile gizlilik beyanları doğrultusunda sahip olursunuz.
Easy Anti-Cheat'in gizlilik uygulamaları hakkında daha fazla bilgiyi şirketin kendi gizlilik beyanında bulabilirsiniz. Bu gizlilik beyanına şu adresten erişebilirsiniz: https://www.easy.ac/support/albion/account/privacy/ 
Xigncode hakkında daha fazla bilgiyi şirketin kendi son kullanıcı lisans anlaşmasında bulabilirsiniz. Bu anlaşmaya şu adresten erişebilirsiniz. https://wellbia.com/?module=Html&action=SiteComp&sSubNo=5.
Easy Anti-Cheat ve Xigncode'un kişisel verilerinizi belirtilen gizlilik beyanı veya son kullanıcı lisans anlaşması doğrultusunda işleyebilmesine engel olursanız ya da Easy Anti-Cheat veya Xigncode'un kişisel verilerinizi kaldırmasını ya da silmesini talep ederseniz, Yayımcı, Easy Anti-Cheat, Xigncode veya üçüncü bir taraf (Yayımcı, Easy Anti-Cheat veya Xigncode tarafından atanan), Oyun'a erişiminizi engelleme ve Oyun'u kullanmanızı önleme hakkına sahip olur.

§ 15 Süre ve Fesih, Erişimi Engelleme ve Devre Dışı Bırakma (Yaptırımlar)
15.1 Süre: Bu anlaşma süresiz olarak yapılmıştır ve feshiyle sona erer. Fesih bildirimleri yazılı şekilde yapılmalıdır. (E-posta yeterlidir.)
15.2 Kullanıcılar Tarafından Fesih. Kullanıcılar bu anlaşmayı diledikleri zaman support@albiononline.com adresine bir fesih bildirimi göndererek feshedebilir.
15.3 Premium Süresi gibi Sanal Avantaj Abonelikleri, ilgili koşullarına tabi olarak feshedilir ve bunların fesihleri bu anlaşmayı otomatik olarak feshetmez. Ancak bir Kullanıcı bu anlaşmayı feshederse bu, tüm Abonelikler için, ilgili koşullarına tabi şekilde bir iptal bildirimi olarak değerlendirilir.
15.4 Sandbox Interactive Tarafından Fesih.
15.4.1 Abonelik için özel şartlara tabi olarak Sandbox Interactive, on dört (14) gün önceden yazılı bildirimde bulunarak bu Sözleşmeyi dilediği zaman sebep sunmadan feshedebilir.
15.4.2 Bu Anlaşma'yı mücbir bir sebeple 14 günden daha kısa bir süre önceden bildirimde bulunarak veya hatta bildirimde bulunmadan feshetme yasal hakkı etkilenmeyecektir.
15.4.3 Mücbir bir sebep, belirli durumun tüm koşulları hesaba katılarak ve iki tarafın da çıkarları tartılarak, taraflardan birinin akdi ilişkiyi anlaşılan süre boyunca veya bildirim süresinin sonuna kadar devam ettirmesi makul bir şekilde beklenemezse sunulur.
15.4.4 Mücbir sebepler, örnek olarak şunları içerir (bunlarla sınırlı olmamakla birlikte):
*        Kullanıcı'nın hile yapması, bot kullanması, finansal sahtekârlık yapması veya hataları ciddi ölçüde kötüye kullanması. Bu vesileyle Kullanıcı'ya, Sandbox Interactive'in Oyun'un bütünlüğünü ve saygınlığını korumak için bu koşullarda önceden uyarı olmaksızın Kullanıcı'nın Oyun'a tüm erişimini derhâl askıya alacağı bildirilir.
*        Kullanıcı'nın, suçlu bir şekilde geçerli yasayı ya da bu Hüküm ve Koşulları, Oyun Kurallarını ihlal etmesi ve/veya kuralları Sanal Avantajlar için kullanması.*        Kullanıcı'nın ödenmesi gereken ücretleri zamanında ödememesi.
*        Kullanıcı'nın bir ödeme ihtilafında veya ters ibrazda bulunması;
*        Kullanıcı'nın kayıt işlevleri aracılığıyla Sandbox Interactive'deki Hesap'ına erişim kazandığı üçüncü tarafların (ör. sosyal ağ operatörleri), Sandbox Interactive'den kullanıcı verilerinin silinmesini ve/veya benzer eylemlerde bulunulmasını talep etmesi ya da Sandbox Interactive'in verilere olan erişimini sınırlaması.
15.4.5 Sandbox Interactive'in gelecekte Oyun'un yürürlüğünü feshetme hakkı saklıdır. Böyle bir olayda Sandbox Interactive, oyunun ve gelecekte böyle bir durum için sunabileceği geçiş hizmetlerinin sonlanacağını üç ay önceden duyurur.
15.5 Feshin etkileri.
15.5.1 Fesih yürürlüğe girdiğinde, Kullanıcı Hesaplarında ve ilgili Karakterlerde hâlâ mevcut olan tüm Sanal Avantajlar dâhil olmak üzere Kullanıcı Hesapları silinir. Kullanıcı tarafından İnternet Sitesi'nde paylaşılan içerik ya kaldırılır ya da bunun yerine Kullanıcı'nın İçerik ile ilişkilendirilen adı kaldırılır. Kullanıcılar, özellikle davranışlarına bağlı olarak taraflarınca sağlanan İçerik'in Kullanıcılar'ın yükümlülükleri için bir ihlal oluşturması durumunda veya İçerik'in silinmesi için yasal bir yükümlülük mevcutsa ya da İçerik genel kişilik haklarını (Persönlichkeitsrechte) etkiliyorsa İçerik'in kaldırılmasında (tamamen veya kısmen) ısrarcı olabilir.
15.5.2 Sandbox Interactive tarafından olağan dışı bir fesih durumunda, oluşturmuş olabileceğiniz veya gelecekte oluşturacağınız diğer hesapları feshetme hakkımız saklıdır. Bu hükmü uygulamak adına, özellikle Kullanıcı bot kullanımı, hile yapma, kendi hizmetlerinin veya üçüncü taraf hizmetlerin reklamını yapma veya finansal sahtekârlıkta bulunduysa Sandbox Interactive, bu Kullanıcı'nın benzer ihlaller gerçekleştirmek üzere fazladan Hesaplar oluşturmasını engellemek için gerekli verileri saklayabilir. Sandbox Interactive, önceden uyarı olmaksızın Kullanıcı'nın fazladan Kullanıcı Hesapları oluşturmasını engelleyebilir ve böyle bir Kullanıcı tarafından oluşturulan fazladan Kullanıcı Hesapları'nı derhâl askıya alabilir.15.5.3 Kullanıcı tarafından olağan dışı fesihten Sandbox Interactive sorumluysa, 4.5.3 maddesinde belirtildiği üzere, yalnızca kullanılmamış Premium Bakiye'nin ve kullanılmamış Premium Süre'nin "Oyuncu'nun Hesapları tarafından gerçek para karşılığında satın alınmış" sayılan kısımları için Sandbox Interactive tarafından telafi sağlanır. Bu durumda Sandbox Interactive, Kullanıcı'ya hâlâ Hesaplarına ve ilgili Karakterlerine kayıtlı olan Premium Bakiye ve Premium Süre'nin eşit olarak dağıtılmış değerini telafi eder. Kullanıcı'nın diğer savları, bu Hüküm ve Koşullarda aksi belirtilmediği sürece hariç tutulur.
15.6 Yaptırımlar
Herhangi yasal veya diğer anlaşma haklarına bakılmaksızın Sandbox Interactive devamlı, tekrarlı olarak veya ciddi bir şekilde yasaların, üçüncü taraf haklarının, Oyun Kuralları'nın veya bu Hüküm ve Koşulların ihlalinde bulundukları için hatalı olan Kullanıcılar için Oyun veya Hizmet erişimini geçici ya da kalıcı olarak kısıtlayabilir veya engelleyebilir. Sandbox Interactive, Kullanıcılar'ı yasal düzenlemelere göre geçici veya kalıcı olarak engelleyebilir. Örneğin Sandbox Interactive sohbet işlevselliğini kısıtlayabilir ya da bir Kullanıcı forum veya sohbetteki diğer Kullanıcılar'a saldırıyorsa bu Kullanıcı'yı forumdan uzaklaştırabilir. Başka bir örnek olarak Kullanıcılar, hile veya bot kullanıyorlarsa kalıcı olarak uzaklaştırılabilirler. Alıntı yapılan ihlaller için verilen yaptırımlar yalnızca örnek amaçlıdır. Yaptırımlar, söz konusu ihlale bağlı olarak çeşitlilik gösterebilir.

§ 16 Sorumluluk
16.1 Sandbox Interactive, yasal hükümlere göre geçerli yasa altında Sandbox Interactive'in veya vekil aracılarının (Erfüllungsgehilfen) kasıtlı veya ağır ihmalkâr davranışlarından kaynaklı Kullanıcılar'ın hasarlarından ve Alman Ürün Sorumluluğu Yasası (Produkthaftungsgesetz) doğrultusunda kişisel sakatlanma ve hasarlardan sorumludur.
16.2 Diğer tüm vakalarda Sandbox Interactive'in hasarlar için sorumluluğu (yasal dayanaklara bakılmaksızın), Sandbox Interactive tarafından kabul edilen bir garanti aksini iddia etmediği sürece aşağıda belirtilen hükümlerde şart koşulduğu şekilde sınırlıdır:
16.2.1 Sandbox Interactive, hafif ihmalden kaynaklı zararlardan yalnızca bu zararların, önemli anlaşma yükümlülüklerinin ihlalinden (esas görevler, Kardinalpflichten) kaynaklı olması hâlinde sorumludur. Ör. Yerine getirilmesi Anlaşma'nın doğru bir şekilde uygulanması için bir ön koşul olan ve Kullanıcılar'ın normalde bekleyebileceği yükümlülükler. Bu doğrultuda Sandbox Interactive'in hafif ihmalkârlıktan sorumlu olduğu kadar Sandbox Interactive'in sorumluluğu genel olarak öngörülebilir hasarla sınırlı olacaktır.16.2.2 Sandbox Interactive'in hafif ihmalkârlıktan dolayı veri ve/veya program kaybından kaynaklanan hasarlar açısından sorumluluğu, Kullanıcılar tarafından düzenli ve uygun veri yedeklemesi yapılması hâlinde ödenecek olan tipik telafi bedeliyle sınırlıdır.16.3 Yukarıdaki 16.2 numaralı paragrafın hükümleri, boş harcamalar için teminat verme yükümlülüğünün sınırlanmasına uygun olarak (Alman Medeni Kanunu'nun 284. bölümü) uygulanır.
16.4 Yukarıdaki sorumluluk sınırlamaları, Sandbox Interactive'in vekil aracılarının (Erfüllungsgehilfen) da lehine uygulanır.
16.5 Sandbox Interactive, Kullanıcılar'ın açıkça Sandbox Interactive tarafından sunulmayan hizmetlerden kaynaklanan masraflarından, özellikle Kullanıcılar'ın mobil cihazlarına veya mobil cihazlarından veri aktarımı için yaptıkları masraflarından sorumlu değildir.
16.6 Taraflar, Hizmetlerin sağlanmasının Alman medeni kanunları kapsamında bir kira sözleşmesi olarak sayılabildiği sürece, Sandbox Interactive'in Alman Medeni Yasası'nın 536a bölümünün 1. fıkrası doğrultusunda sorumlu olmayacağı ve bu yasal hükmün geçersiz olacağı hususunu kabul eder. (Bu, başlangıçta mevcut olan kusurlar için kusurluluk kabul edilmeyeceği ve garanti sunulmayacağı anlamına gelir.)
16.7
B. OYUNA AVRUPA DIŞINDAN ERİŞİYORSANIZ
NOT: BU MADDE, OYUNA AVRUPA'DAN ERİŞİYORSANIZ GEÇERLİ DEĞİLDİR
I. SORUMLULUK SINIRLAMASI: GEÇERLİ YASANIN SUNDUĞU AZAMİ ÖLÇÜDE, SANDBOX INTERACTIVE VE BAĞLI KURUMLARI; HİÇBİR DURUMDA, OYUNUN KULLANIMINDAN VEYA KULLANILAMAMASINDAN YA DA OYUN İÇİNDEKİ VEYA OYUNDAN KAYNAKLI, BUNLARLA SINIRLI OLMAYIP BİLGİSAYARININ, İŞLETİM SİSTEMİNİN VEYA BELGELERİNİN GÜVENLİĞİNİN İHLALİ YA DA SAĞLANAN DESTEK HİZMETLERİ VEYA SAĞLANAMAMASI DÂHİL BİR KUSURDAN MEYDANA GELEN HERHANGİ ÖZEL, RASTLANTISAL, DOLAYLI VEYA SONUÇ OLARAK ORTAYA ÇIKAN HASARLARDAN (BUNLARLA SINIRLI OLMAMAKLA BİRLİKTE İŞ KÂRININ KAYBINDAN KAYNAKLI HASARLAR, İŞ KESİNTİSİ, İŞ BİLGİLERİNİN KAYBI VEYA HERHANGİ DİĞER MADDİ KAYIP), SANDBOX INTERACTIVE BU HASARLARIN İHTİMALİNDEN HABERDAR EDİLDİYSE BİLE, HİÇBİR ŞEKİLDE SORUMLU OLMAYACAKTIR. HER KOŞULDA SANDBOX INTERACTIVE'İN BU ANLAŞMANIN HÜKÜMLERİ ALTINDAKİ TÜM SORUMLULUĞU, TAKDİRİ TAMAMEN SANDBOX INTERACTIVE'E AİT OLUP SİZİN TARAFINIZDAN OYUN İÇİN GERÇEKTEN ÖDENEN MİKTARLA VEYA OYUNUN BENZER SATIŞ DEĞERİNE SAHİP BİR ÜRÜNLE DEĞİŞİMİ İLE SINIRLIDIR. BAZI EYALETLER VE YARGI MERCİLERİ SORUMLULUĞUN HARİÇ TUTULMASINA VEYA SINIRLANMASINA İZİN VERMEDİĞİNDEN YUKARIDAKİ SINIRLAMA SİZİN İÇİN KISMEN VEYA TAMAMEN GEÇERLİ OLMAYABİLİR.
NOT: BU MADDE, OYUNA AVRUPA'DAN ERİŞİYORSANIZ GEÇERLİ DEĞİLDİR
II. Kullanıcılar, Sandbox Interactive'i ve bağlı kurumlarını ve bunların ilgili yetkililerini, çalışanlarını, yöneticilerini, aracılarını, Kullanıcılarını (siz hariç), alt Kullanıcılarını (siz hariç), varislerini ve vekillerini (a) Kullanıcı'nın bu Anlaşma'nın herhangi bir maddesini ihlal etmesinden, (b) Kullanıcı'nın herhangi bir üçüncü tarafla herhangi bir hakkı ihlal etmesinden veya (c) Kullanıcı'nın Uygulamalar dâhil İnternet Sitesi'ni veya Oyun'u kullanımı veya kötüye kullanımından kaynaklanan veya bunlarla ilgili olan herhangi bir savdan, davadan ya da hukuki sebepten meydana gelen her türlü ve tüm sorumluluktan, bedelden, kayıptan, hasardan ve masraftan (makul avukat ücretleri ve masrafları dâhil) savunmayı ve sorumlu tutmamayı kabul ederler. Hemen önceki cümlede öne sürülen Kullanıcı'nın teminat yükümlülükleri bu Anlaşma'nın feshinden sonra geçerliliğini korur.

§ 17 Erişilebilirlik
17.1 Aksi şekilde anlaşılmadığı takdirde Hizmetlerin, Oyun'un ve İnternet Sitesi'nin belirli bir erişilebilirliği üzerine anlaşılmamıştır. Sandbox Interactive yine de tüm Kullanıcılar için Hizmetlere, Oyun'a ve İnternet Sitesi'ne günde 24 saat, haftada 7 gün erişim sağlamak için çaba gösterir. Standart bakımlardan kaynaklı geçici işlev kesintileri ve üçüncü taraf sağlayıcılar veya üçüncü taraf ağ operatörlerinin yanı sıra mücbir sebeplerden dolayı doğal internet kesintileri mümkündür. Bu doğrultuda Kullanıcı'ya, Hizmet'e kesintisiz erişim garanti edilmez.
17.2 Aylık bir ortalamada Sandbox Interactive, Oyun'un resmî çıkışından başlayıp herhangi denemeler veya deneme sunucuları hariç tutularak Oyun için %90 oranında bir erişilebilirlik sağlayacaktır. Oyun'a Sandbox Interactive'in hükmü dışında sebeplerden dolayı erişilemediği süreler (ör. mücbir sebepler, üçüncü tarafların kabahatleri vb.) bundan muaftır. Düzenli bakımın gerçekleştiği süreler de (genellikle günde 1 saat) bundan muaftır. Oyun'un yoğunluğu, özellikle bir oyun güncellemesi çıktıktan sonraki ilk haftalarda beklenenden daha yüksek olduğunda meydana gelebilecek sıra süreleri de bundan muaftır. Erişilemezlik yukarıda belirtilen ölçütler dâhilindeyse Sandbox Interactive bundan sorumlu değildir. Sandbox Interactive'in sunucunun erişilemezliği için sorumluluğu kasıtlı ve ağır ihmalkârlık durumunda etkilenmeyecektir.17.3 Mobil cihazlar ve internet ile bağlantılı olarak hatasız performans garanti edilmez. Özellikle Sandbox Interactive, teknik sisteminin kesintisiz mevcudiyetinden veya aktarımdaki hatalardan dolayı Kullanıcı'nın kendisi, diğer Kullanıcılar ya da üçüncü taraflar tarafından Kullanıcı'nın kullanımına sunulan bilgilerin eksiksizliğinden, doğruluğundan ve güncelliğinden sorumlu değildir.
17.4 Oyun ve İnternet Sitesi dünya çapında erişilebilir olmayabilir. Oyun'a ve İnternet Sitesi'ne tamamen mi yoksa sınırlı bir şekilde mi erişilebileceği belirli ülkelerde yasal yönetmeliklere ve lisans gereksinimlerine bağlı olabilir. Oyun'un açıklaması bu durum hakkında daha fazla ayrıntı içerebilir.

§ 18 Tüketici Bilgileri
Oyun'a dair zorunlu Tüketici bilgileri şu adreste bulunabilir: https://albiononline.com/en/consumer-information.

§ 19 Verilerin Korunması, Gizlilik Politikası
Gizlilik Politikası şu adresten görüntülenebilir: https://albiononline.com/en/privacy_policy.

§ 20 Geçerli Yasa
Bu Anlaşma ve bundan kaynaklı tüm ihtilaflar, Kullanıcı'nın ikametgâhı yurt dışında olsa bile CISG (Milletlerarası Mal Satımına İlişkin Sözleşmeler Hakkında Birleşmiş Milletler Antlaşması) hariç tutularak Alman yasası ile yönetilecek ve bu doğrultuda incelenecektir. Tüketici Kullanıcılar'a ilişkin olarak bu yasa tercihi yalnızca Kullanıcı zorunlu yasal hükümler tarafından sağlanan bir korumadan mahrum bırakılmadığı sürece uygulanacaktır. (Örneğin, Kullanıcı'nın sürekli ikamet ettiği ülkenin özel anlaşmalarla feragat edilemeyen korumaları.)

§ 21 Oyun Kuralları
Ek Oyun Kurallarını https://albiononline.com/en/game-rules adresinde görüntüleyebilirsiniz.

Where we employ brawn and steel to battle, the Keepers use stone straight from the earth. Show them the inferiority of their weapons.
The Druids have mastered the magical energies of Albion, but we have never yielded to them before, and will not start now.
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_MORGANA_PROMOTION_1_O: You please the lady Morgana. Take this letter to [variable:AGENT_A] in the wastes, and take the fight to the heart of their foul crypts
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_MORGANA_UNDEAD_BOSS_1: The chief archers have some ancient poison on their arrows. With all their strength and steel, how can our knights fight that which attacks their very blood?
We fear that whatever plant or berry bore the antidote died out many years ago - as the undead should have!
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_MORGANA_UNDEAD_BOSS_2: Only the Undead could wield the magic of doom so masterfully. It's said the bells in their ruined churches and crypts still hum with that obscene power. Silence them!
When their magic is quelled, perhaps the ringing will stop?
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_MORGANA_UNDEAD_BOSS_3: The Voyagers interfered the most with Morgana's plans; an endless sea of trained soldiers, still brought to their knees by a mere whisper from Her lips. And now they dare to meddle again?
Perhaps being buried once is not enough...
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_MORGANA_UNDEAD_GENERI: Why do these soldiers of old appear animate now? Be a sweet and return them to their prior state, would you? What happened in the old wars should stay buried...
What happened in the old wars should stay buried...
The Undead work with some magical power now, and they wield it like experienced sorcerers. How far they have come since the wars...
Cut down the mages - they pose the biggest threat.
One would think the dead had learned the first time... No matter, some lessons demand a second teaching.
Maybe this time they will learn? One can but hope...
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_HERETIC_BOSS_1: The thieves desecrate our crypts, stealing tokens and preparations from the tombs of our brothers and sisters. Now their souls will never make the journey they set out to on death, and will suffer for all eternity. Stop the thieves!
They do not know the damage they do!
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_HERETIC_GENERI: The ones with the knives... always poking, always digging. What for? They bring us to the surface, and they break us when they find us. Punish them.
They show no clear purpose, they just destroy.
The hermits... Their magic burns us, eats us away inside where we have no inside. Drive them away from us.
How can it hurt so much? What is it they wield?
These... "Heretics". They destroy, they subvert, they create nothing of worth, all they bring is decay and dissolution... They should be excised, for the good of all.
The living... squander their existence. Why?
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_KEEPER_BOSS_1_: The Berserks hammer us to pieces! Fragments scattered to the winds, a disgraceful burial! We are husks, yes, but may we not at least remain whole?
Destroy those who bring us disgrace!
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_KEEPER_BOSS_2_: The giants! Their every step sends a shiver down through the earth! They crack the stones of our crypts and trap us in the dark. To be buried is a fate to suffer only once!
They won't be easy to bring down... They never have been.
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_KEEPER_ELITE_1: The men here... always running, stamping, shouting... it shakes our bones, it jars our joints... does it wake us from our sleep? We wish to sleep... Stop them. Please.
Why must they break the earth with their stride?
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_KEEPER_ELITE_2: The ones with the long beards... our mages sense their magic, say they work with powers of life. Is it them who bind us to this undeath? We wish to sleep... Make them stop.
If they do not understand, they should not meddle!
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_KEEPER_ELITE_3: Drumming and dancing and running and chanting and stamping and stomping and crashing and thumping... Too much too much TOO MUCH MAKE THEM STOP... We only wish to sleep...
What corruption compels them to agitate the land so?
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_KEEPER_GENERIC: The men here... always running, stamping, shouting... it shakes our bones, it jars our joints... does it wake us from our sleep? We wish to sleep... Stop them. Please.
Why must they break the earth with their stride?
The ones with the long beards... our mages sense their magic, say they work with powers of life. Is it them who bind us to this undeath? We wish to sleep... Make them stop.
If they do not understand, they should not meddle!
Drumming and dancing and running and chanting and stamping and stomping and crashing and thumping... Too much too much TOO MUCH MAKE THEM STOP... We only wish to sleep...
What corruption compels them to agitate the land so?
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_MORGANA_BOSS_1: They call them Priestesses... But there was nothing so unholy and dishonourable! It was they who buried our brothers and sisters in unmarked graves; trapped their souls beyond retrieval. I want them to feel that fear.
See how they feel to be denied a final audience with their abhorrent Queen!
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_MORGANA_GENERI: The ones in robes... they stand behind and keep control. Mayhap they know something of our prior fate?
Did you find what was inside them?
We... remember a hail of bolts, falling out of the sky. Ours? Or theirs? Collect some for us, perhaps they will stir memory.
The hum of the string, it calls to us... a warning?
We watch them fight, and something stirs. Were... were we soldiers? Is this a shard of memory? Or did we merely watch?
It is so hard to be sure, the past is like a broken mirror. Are we broken?
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_PROMOTION_1_OF: You bring us the rest we crave... We thank you... [variable:AGENT_A] also seeks your help - will you go to their aid?
MISSIONS_T6_COMBAT_UNDEAD_PROMOTION_1_PR: You bring quiet... This is good...
MISSIONS_T7_COMBAT_KEEPER_MORGANA_BOSS_1: The Icons are made in Her image, abhorrent reminders of what once was. They are Her most powerful magic-wielders, and their very existence threatens Albion. Remove this threat!
Be careful, the Icons wield powerful dark magic.
MISSIONS_T7_COMBAT_KEEPER_MORGANA_GENERI: These armored knights... we know that strange glow behind that metal. Why do they return now?
The armour - we must know all you can tell of their armour!
The cultists move to some hidden purpose, some silent beating drum... and a tang in the deepest earths... brimstone? This bodes evil.
To what foul purpose do they bend their will?
At every turn, blades and bolts block our search. Clear the way, so that our wisest might hope to understand...
It pains us to beg assistance in this, but their strength!
MISSIONS_T7_COMBAT_KEEPER_PROMOTION_1_OF: You have served Albion well, friend. Take this token to [variable:AGENT_A], that you may serve further.
MISSIONS_T7_COMBAT_KEEPER_PROMOTION_1_PR: Service does the land honour, friend.
MISSIONS_T7_COMBAT_KEEPER_UNDEAD_GENERIC: It brings us little pleasure, but the Undead must be stopped before the damage they do threatens our lands. Do what must be done.
Be gentle if you can, but you must return them to their rest.
Why do those who fought and died wish to fight again? And why do those who stood with the land now struggle against it?
There is a higher power at work here.
The cycle of life and death is central to this land... but these Undead subvert its workings. They are an aberration that must be corrected.
Close the circle, for their own good as well as for ours.
MISSIONS_T7_COMBAT_MORGANA_UNDEAD_GENERI: The Undead reign in the Deadlands, plaguing the skies with their foul mists; our champions cannot fight cloaked enemies. Perhaps you can?
As much as we love the dark, this world cannot be left to fester in their mists.
We need to make our way into the crypts of the Undead far below the earth. Never you mind why. We need the space... clean.
We need a large, clear space for our work.
The armies, risen again, are as strong as ever. But they were overpowered once; and must be again.
MISSIONS_T7_COMBAT_UNDEAD_MORGANA_BOSS_1: We know those horns, the brutal, glowing heart of that staff, the cruelty in those eyes. A High Priestess, sent to do Her bidding. She must not be allowed to continue!
Don't get too close! And remember: You must never listen to a word she utters!
MISSIONS_T7_COMBAT_UNDEAD_MORGANA_GENERI: The Knights... we remember their blades... We remember them scything us down like wheat... So much power... More than a man should ever contain. Kill them as they killed us.
We do not feel pity... Because they do not deserve it, or because we no longer can?

Their soldiers... We gave as good as we got. It was a fair fight, us against them... But then they brought... OTHER things to bear. The Soldiers gloated as they ran us through, once the balance was tipped in their favor. Show them how it feels.
They had our respect... At first...
Their bolts fell into us, like a piercing arch. Our arrows flew in return, but without the dark weight that rained down on our heads. They were... unnatural.
They pierced through us, and they pierced through the stones around us.
MISSIONS_T7_COMBAT_UNDEAD_PROMOTION_1_OF: They seek to recover their former strength, but they have not attained it yet. We must strike now, before they do. Go, help [variable:AGENT_A] make the final push!
MISSIONS_T7_COMBAT_UNDEAD_PROMOTION_1_PR: This time, we will have our revenge.
MISSIONS_T8_COMBAT_KEEPER_MORGANA_ELITE_: Demons. The Cultists consort with demons. Kill them. All. NOW!
We fear for the very land itself, if their plans come to pass...
Do the Disciples have a new puppeteer now? Or are they caught in a pact? No matter - they must be held to account.
They will be held accountable for their experiments with dark forces, as they were before.
They are all equally culpable in the atrocity they strive towards. End them as the monsters they are.
How could any living person countenance such an offence against life itself?
MISSIONS_T8_COMBAT_UNDEAD_MORGANA_ELITE_: The Cultists, they brought the darkness before. We will not allow them to do so again. Find them. Kill them. Break the cycle.
They know what they do, and they will not repent. They must be brought to justice.
Their infantry, they fight on the side of darkness. We must stand in the light, and let them know they cannot succeed a second time. Strike them down.
We remember. We do not hate. But we finally understand. We know what must be done.

Last we fought, they broke us 'cross their knee. Now they find that without their dark power they are weak, and yet without our flesh we still stand strong. Let them taste the bitter realization that we last knew when we saw the battle's looming end.
This is no longer our time, but this is finally our turn.
MISSIONS_TRADE_PACK_CAERLEON_TO_FACTION_:
Sen ölmedin, [playername]. Son sefer gönderdiğim zavallı ahmaktan daha iyi. Belki de gerçekten [agentplayerfaction] beyliğine girebilirsin.

Sonraki biralar benden.

[playername], biraz para kazanmak ister misin? Bu [variable:ITEM_REQUIRED] eşyasını [variable:FACTION_B] beyliğinin yakınındaki bağlantımıza götür. Onu biraz [variable:ITEM_REWARD] ile takas edeceğiz ve sonra [agentplayerfaction] çevresindeki tüccarlara uçuk fiyata satacağız. 

Yani var mısın yoksa daha iyi birini mi bulmalıyım?

Ha. Sana güvenebileceğimi biliyordum, [playername]. Şimdi bu [variable:ITEM_A] eşyasını [variable:AGENTS_A] adlı karaktere götür.

[variable:FACTION_B] beyliğinde tanıdıkları var ve seni bekliyorlar.

Şimdi fikrimi değiştirmeden buradan git [playername]!

MISTS_INFO_INTRO_TEXT:
Kraliyet Kıtası'nı veya Dış Diyarlar'ı keşfederken küçük Sis Perilerini görecek ve duyacaksınız. 
Bunları takip ederseniz gizli bir dünyanın girişine gidersiniz: Sisli Diyar.
Sis Perilerinin farklı türleri vardır - Sırada, Nadir ve Efsanevi - bunlar sizi Sisli Diyar'ın farklı kademelerine götürecektir.
MISTS_INFO_VARIANTS_TEXT:
Tekli ve çift seçenekleri vardır: Sisli Diyar ve Büyük Sisli Diyar.
Sizi hiç kimse Sisli Diyar portalına kadar takip edemez ama Sisli Diyar bölgesi içinde zaten başka oyuncular olabilir.
Diğer oyunculara ""Gizli Yabancı"" olarak görüneceksiniz.
Sisli Diyar bölgeleri belirli bir süre sonra kapanır ancak yeni Sis Perileri bularak veya Knightfall Abbey'e girerek daha derinlere inebilirsiniz.
MISTS_STATIC_ENTRANCE_FEATURES_INFO:
Sisli Diyar, tekli ve çiftli oyunculara özelleştirilmiş bir deneyim sunar.
Büyük gruplar Sisli Diyar'a birlikte giremezler. Ayrıca süre sınırlamaları grupların zamanla büyümesine engel olur.

MISTS_STATIC_ENTRANCE_USAGE_DISABLED_BY_: Bu Sisli Diyar girişi geçici olarak devre dışı. Bu durum yakında düzeltilecektir.
MISTS_STATIC_ENTRANCE_USAGE_FAILED_ALREA: Sabit Sisli Diyar girişini zaten kullandın, çok yakında Sisli Diyar'a ışınlanacaksın.
MISTS_STATIC_ENTRANCE_USAGE_FAILED_BLOCK: Sabit Sisli Diyar girişi kullanımı bekleme süresinde, lütfen {0} bekle.
MISTS_STATIC_ENTRANCE_USAGE_FAILED_NOT_F: Sisli Diyar çıkışı bulunamadı, lütfen bu hatayı bildir.

MOBSPEAK_HARVESTER_PLAYERSPAWN_ENRAGE_BU: Daha fazla küçük ruh... Yaşam enerjin beni çağırıyor...
Etrafımdaki tüm bu yaşam enerjisi... BEN ÖLÜM OLACAĞIM.
MOBSPEAK_KEEPER_DRUID: Varlığın dengeyi tehlikeye atıyor... Ölmen gerekiyor...
MOBSPEAK_KEEPER_EARTHMOTHER: Gel bana! Etini gökteki kuşlara ve yerdeki canavarlara vereceğim.
MOBSPEAK_KEEPER_SEER: Hayatınla Albion'a işkence ediyorsun. Ölümünle onu besleyeceksin!
MOBSPEAK_MORGANA_CHAMPION: Buraya kadar geldin... ama daha fazla ilerlemeyeceksin!
MOBSPEAK_MORGANA_CHAMPION_ENRAGE_BUFF_1: Ne? Bu kadar çok sayıda mısınız? Önemi yok.
MOBSPEAK_MORGANA_CHAMPION_ENRAGE_BUFF_2: Sayılarınız anlamsız, daha da sert savaşacağım!
MOBSPEAK_MORGANA_CHAMPION_ENRAGE_BUFF_3: Arrrr! Çok fazlasıyla savaşmak içimdeki Morgana gücünü uyandırıyor!
MOBSPEAK_MORGANA_CROSSBOWMAN: Üstünde adın olan bir okum var...
MOBSPEAK_MORGANA_DEMON_PRINCE_ENRAGE_BUF: Ne kadar fazlasını getirirsen o kadar fazlası ölecek...
Sayılar beni alt edemez, beni sadece daha da öfkelendiriyorsun.
Sayılar beni alt edemez, doruk noktamdayım!
MOBSPEAK_MORGANA_KNIGHT_ENRAGE: Sabrımı çok uzun süre sınadın. Sonunla yüzleşmeye hazırlan.
MOBSPEAK_UNDEAD_GENERAL: Beni... rahatsız etmeye cüret mi ediyorsun?

MONOLITH_ACCESS_INFO_NOT_POSSSIBLE: Koruma kalkanlarını sadece üs mıntıkaları etkinleştirebilir. Bu mıntıkaya herkes özgürce girebilir.

MONOLITH_FOOD_STORAGE_INFO: Mıntıkaların işlev görmek için yiyeceğe ihtiyacı vardır. Bir mıntıkanın yiyeceği tükenirse mıntıka kaybedilir.

MONOLITH_GIVEUP_TERRITORY_QUESTION: "{0}" mıntıkasını gerçekten elden çıkarmak istiyor musun?
MONOLITH_GUI_ONLY_CLAIM_IN_PRIME_TIME: Mıntıkaları yalnızca işlek saatleri esnasında ele geçirebilirsin. {0} kaldı.

[b]Doğrudan internet sitemizden indirilen istemciyi[/b] kullandığın için teşekkürler!
Bu istemciyi kullanarak bize, yani Albion Online geliştiricilerine, en büyük desteği göstermiş oluyorsun.
Minnettarlığımızı göstermek adına, yerel istemciden girilen [b]oyun içi mağazadan[/b] ya da doğrudan [b]internet sitemizden[/b] yapılan Altın alışverişlerinde elde edilen Altın miktarını artırdık.
Güncellenmiş Altın miktarları hakkında bilgi edinmek için aşağıdaki [b]"Detaylar"[/b] butonuna tıklayabilirsin!

Yok: Elle kilitlenilmediği sürece her zaman menzilindeki en iyi hedefi seçer.
Otomatik: Elle kilitlenilmediği sürece mevcut hedef geçerli ve menzil dâhilindeyse kilitlenme durumunu korur.

En Yakındaki: Her zaman en yakındaki müttefike öncelik verilir.
Geçerli bir hedef olmaması durumunda destek büyüleri kendi üzerinde kullanılır

PORTAL_BINDING_TUTORIAL_DESC:
Bu portaldan geçmen durumunda bu portalla ilişkilendirileceksin.
Bu ilişkilendirme işlemi, diğer şehir portallarına girmeni engelleyecektir.
Kraliyet Kıtası'na geri dönmek için herhangi bir Dış Diyar portalına girebilirsin.
Başka şehre bağlı bir Dış Diyar portalıyla dönmen durumunda, o şehir portalıyla ilişkilendirileceksin.
PORTAL_CITY_INFO_TEXT_01:
Portal şehirlerinde Eser Dökümhanelerinden Keşif Seferi Ustalarına kadar ihtiyacın olan her şeyi bulabilirsin.
Portal şehirleri, ait oldukları Kraliyet Şehri'nin Pazar Yeri'ni ve bankasını paylaşır.
Her çıkışta iki adet Görünmezlik Mabedi bulunur.
PORTAL_CITY_INFO_TEXT_02:
Bu mabetler, 120 saniyeliğine görünmezlik ve bağışıklık kazandırır.
Görünmezken saldıramaz veya yeteneklerini kullanamazsın.
Toplayıcılık veya yağmalama gibi eylemler aracılığıyla dünya ile etkileşime geçmen durumunda görünmezlik bozulur ve susturulursun.
PORTALBINDING_CANCEL_HOME_CONFIRMATION: Bu Diyar Geçidi'ni kullanman durumunda mevcut ev konumun geçersiz kılınacak ve yeniden kendin bir ev seçmen gerekecek. Devam edilsin mi?

PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_BOTSPAM: Botları kullanarak sohbete art arda mesajlar gönderme.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_CHEAT_ACCU: Diğer oyunculara herkese açık bir şekilde hile yapmakla suçlamak yasaktır. Bunun yerine support@albiononline.com adresine bir rapor gönder.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_DISCRIMINA: Ayrımcı, ırkçı veya bağnaz bir dil kullanmak yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_DISCUSSION: Herkese açık kanallarda siyaset ve din konuşmaya izin yoktur.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_DOXXING_PH: Kendin dahil herhangi bir oyuncunun kişisel bilgilerini toplamaya veya ifşa etmeye yönelik tüm girişimler yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_EXTREME_HA: Nefret söylemi veya aşırı uygunsuz söylemler yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_GAMBLINGAD: Kumar veya şans oyunlarının reklamını yapmak yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_HACKS_BOTS: Hile ve bot programları veya oyun açıklarını paylaşmak yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_HELP_TROLL: Yardım kanalında yanlış bilgi yaymak veya trollemek yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_IMPERSONAT: Moderatörleri, GM'leri veya geliştiricileri taklit etmek yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_INAPPROPRI: Karakter ismin değerlendirmeye alındığından bu süreç sonuçlanana kadar geçici olarak susturuldun. Detaylı bilgi için support@albiononline.com adresinden bizimle iletişime geçebilirsin.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_LANG_CHANN: Dile özel kanallarda ilgili dili kullanmalısınız. Özel kanalı bulunmayan diller için /global sohbet kanalı kullanılmalıdır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_LIBEL: Oyuncuları herkese açık bir şekilde suç faaliyeti ile suçlamak yasaktır. Bir suç işlendiğine dair kanıtın varsa lütfen support@albiononline.com adresinden bir şikâyet oluştur ya da yerel yetkililerle iletişime geç.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_MALICIOUS_: Tartışma çıkarmak veya oyuncuları provoke etmek yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_MODDECISIO: Moderasyonun kararlarını herkese açık kanallarda tartışmak yasaktır. Haksız muamele gördüğünü düşünüyorsan lütfen support@albiononline.com adresinden bizimle iletişime geç.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_RLTHREAT: Diğer oyunculara gerçek yaşam tehditlerinde bulunmak yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_RMT_JOKE: Şaka dahi olsa üçüncü taraf ticaretinin / gerçek para ticaretinin konuşulması ve tanıtımı yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_RMTAD: Üçüncü parti ticaret sitelerinin reklamını yapmak yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_SPAM: Sohbet art arda mesajlar göndermeyin (aynı mesajı her 2 dakikada bir birden fazla kez göndermek), her zaman büyük harf kullanmayın veya tanıtımları sürekli göndermeyin.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_SPAM_WAVE_: Diğer oyuncuları mesaj yağmuru dalgalarına katılmaya teşvik etmek yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_SUPPORT_TO: Şartlara ve koşullara uyulması gerekir. Lütfen bakınız: https://albiononline.com/terms_and_conditions
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_TERMS_AND_: Şartlara ve koşullara uyulması gerekir. Lütfen bakınız: https://albiononline.com/terms_and_conditions
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_TOPIC_CHAN: Konunun belirli bir kanalı varsa tartışmaların o kanalda sürdürülmesi gerekir (ticaret in /tr, üye alım in /rec, Zor Keşif Seferleri in /hce, grup arayanlar in /lfg).
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_TOXIC_GAME: Albion Online ve geliştiricileri hakkında sürekli ve aşırı olumsuz yorumlar yapmak yasaktır. Geri bildirim ve öneriler için forum.albiononline.com adresindeki resmî forum kullanılmalıdır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_TOXICITY: Müstehcen ve uygunsuz dil kullanmak yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_WIPE_TROLL: Sunucu sıfırlanması hakkında yanlış bilgi yaymak yasaktır.
PREDEFINED_MOD_CMTOOL_MESSAGE_WRONG_CHAN: Lonca alımlarının /rec kanalı dışına taşınması yasaktır.

Avalon Yolları'na girebilmek için beylik hasımlığını kaldırman gerek.

ROADS_OF_AVALON_ENTRANCE_TIMEOUT_WARNING: Bu bağlantı yakında kapanacak ve ardından başka bir konuma yeniden bağlanabilir. Girmek istediğinden emin misin?
ROADS_OF_AVALON_HIDEOUTS_TUTORIAL_CONTEN:
Bölgenin işlek saatleri içerisinde yakın bir yerde bir sığınak inşa edilmesini mümkün kılar.
Avalon Yolları içerisine yerleştirilen sığınaklar, bölgenin işlek saatleri içerisinde herhangi bir loncanın saldırısına maruz kalabilir.
Sığınaklar için, bölge haritasında gösterilen bölge zanaat değiştiricileri geçerli olur.
ROADS_OF_AVALON_INFO_CONTENT_TEXT:
Burada güçlü baş düşmanların yanı sıra her boyutta grup için değerli ödüller, hazineler ve kaynaklar bulacaksın.
Yollar'da ayrıca diğer Yollar bölgelerine ve Albion alanlarına geçiş yapabileceğin portallar vardır ve sürekli değişen bir ağ oluşturur.
Loncalar, İşlek Saatler'de Yollar'ın belirli bölgelerine Sığınaklar yerleştirebilir.
ROADS_OF_AVALON_INFO_LOCATION_TEXT:
Avalon Yolları girişleri, Albion'un herhangi bir yerinde rastgele ortaya çıkabilir ve birkaç saat açık kalabilir.
Girişler, Mini Haritada ve Bölge Haritasında sol tarafta gördüğün sembolle işaretlenir.
Her Yollar girişinde sınırlı sayıda yük vardır.
Bir Yollar girişinden geçerseniz bu yüklerden biri tüketilir ve yükün geri kazanılması biraz zaman alır.
ROAMING_ENCAMPMENTS_INFO_SOLO_OR_WITH_AL:
Kamplar keşfedildikten sonra haritada işaretlenecektir.
Tekli veya Grup Kamplarının simgeleri ve boyutları farklıdır.
Haritada herhangi bir simge göremezsen düşmanlar şu anda Kampta değil demektir ancak daha sonra kampa geri dönebilirler. Kamplara tekrar bakmayı unutmayın.
Grup Kampları, 5 kişilik gruplar için önerilir.
ROAMING_ENCAMPMENTS_INFO_TAKE_ON_CAMPS_T:
Dinamik Kamplar, Sarı Bölgelerden başlamak üzere açık dünyanın her yerinde bulunabilir. Düşman grupları her gün farklı konumlarda kamp kurabilir ve gün boyunca kamplardan ayrılabilir veya kamplara geri dönebilirler.
Kamp Zulasını açmak için Kamp içindeki düşmanları yenerek belirli miktarda Nam kazanmanız gerekir.
Her sayıdan oyuncu zulaları yağmalayabilir ve her bir oyuncu için yağma içerir.
ROAMING_MOBS_INFO_TEXT:
Maceranız boyunca dünyada dolaşan düşmanlarla karşılaşacaksınız. 
Bu düşmanlar yalnız başına kaldıklarında daha üst zorluk seviyelerine yükselecek.
Daha güçlü düşmanlar daha fazla Nam ve daha değerli ödüller verir.
Daha az oyuncuyu barındıran uzak bölgelerde genellikle daha değerli düşmanlar olur.
